untranslatable_reason: This signal requires real-time option pricing data (straddle price, in-the-money/out-of-the-money status, buyback price tracking) which are not available in the standard price/technical indicator set. The core logic depends on monitoring: (1) initial straddle value at entry, (2) current ITM option price vs. that reference value, (3) option moneyness status. These require options chain data not representable by ALLOWED_INDICATORS.
translation_notes: Signal is an options-specific strategy that cannot be translated to price-action rules alone. Entry condition 'straddle has been sold' and buyback trigger 'ITM option reaches initial straddle price' require options-specific position tracking and pricing unavailable in this backtester. Recommend implementing as a custom options module or providing greeks/option_price indicators.
